review_body_text: Everything is good. The workplace is nice and people are also willing to help. The workplace and work-culture appreciate people who are working overtime.
So much to learn here. Colleague is all nice but need to push for sales. All higher ups care is sales. Try banking if you love doing sales. Benefit is good. Have AL every month.
A good place to learn and improve in. The enviroment is chill, collegues are kind and are willing to assist if faced with issues. Overall is a good oppertunity for an internship placement.
Fast paced environment and can learn a lot of new things. Pleasent people to work with. Great benefits and perks. Moderate level of work and life balance.

Not to say that all departments are like this but majority of leaders who has been with the bank >10years will have mentality like this. My advise is to ask a lot of questions during your interview so you can judge whether it is a good fit for you. Other than that, good benefits and bonus 😬

My internship at Maybank was an incredibly valuable experience. I learned how a leading financial institution operates and gained hands-on exposure to real banking tasks. The team was supportive and always willing to guide me, which helped me develop both technical and communication skills. I was involved in data entry, customer service, and administrative work, which improved my attention to detail and time management. The working environment was professional yet friendly, making it easy to adapt and learn. Overall, my internship at Maybank gave me a strong foundation and clearer understanding of the banking industry.

A great place to learn and grow as an intern. The environment is supportive, with great leaders and amazing teammates who are always willing to help. There’s a good work-life balance, especially with the weekly work-from-home option. Things can get a bit hectic during system changes, but overall it’s a valuable and enjoyable learning experience.

review_title: very good experience because can learn about work environment
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? friendly staff and good environment. What is the most stressful part about working at the company? stress if there is any accidental mistake that we didn't notice and need to re do whole thing.
Need to achieve a high kpi with changing directions from upper management. Fast pace environment. Not supportive manager. However good environment and supportive team members

review_title: Everything is great here, can learn so many things but do not become protege or join programme
review_body_text: Chances of you getting a job permanently is almost impossible. Please reconsider if you expecting to have stable career soon after graduation. In terms of learning and experience you might gain a lot but not appreciating protege or graduate lvl.
great co workers never stressful you can go home on time work life balance bosses are kind and they always check up on you they are also responsive of your inquiries

I would like to take this opportunity to express my heartfelt appreciation to my colleagues at Maybank Alor Setar who have been incredibly supportive and generous with their guidance since my very first day. Their willingness to share knowledge, their patience in teaching, and their constant encouragement have made a huge difference in my growth and confidence at work. They’re not just coworkers — they’ve become mentors who are always ready to help without hesitation. Every piece of advice and every small lesson has helped me improve and become more efficient in handling my responsibilities. I truly value the positive and professional work environment they create, filled with teamwork, respect, and mutual support. Thank you for being such wonderful teammates and for making my experience here so meaningful. I’m truly grateful, and I hope our bond continues to grow stronger as we move forward together.

My internship experience was okay overall. It really depends on which department you’re placed in—if you end up in the right one, it’s easier to fit in and there’s a better chance of getting absorbed into the company. The allowance was given based on the number of days you worked, which might not work for everyone expecting a fixed monthly pay. Honestly the people in my team are nice, but in terms of workloads there weren’t much that interns are allowed to do as it is customer’s privacy matters.
Pro Good benefits to employee-insurance,bonus,allowances,increment,epf, staff loan, building facilities Cons Promoted next grade slow Too many expatriates
Maybank is a good place for fresh graduate, a lot you can learn and develop here. However, there is no work life balance that may make you exhausted. Need to always on standby mode.
Good environment good workplace excellent customer care service able to deliver customer satisfaction with care. Career enhancing and good vibes. Really enjoyed

Great Work Environment: Employees often mention the inclusive and collaborative culture at Maybank. There is a strong sense of teamwork, and people enjoy working in a diverse, respectful, and supportive environment. Work-Life Balance: Many reviews highlight the company's efforts to maintain a good work-life balance. Employees appreciate the flexibility in working hours, the option for remote work (in some roles), and generous leave policies. Career Growth Opportunities: Maybank is known for offering career advancement opportunities. Employees often note that the company invests in their professional development, with various training programs and mentorship opportunities available to support career progression. Employee Benefits: Benefits packages are another strong point. Maybank offers competitive compensation, health insurance, retirement benefits, and wellness programs. Employees value these perks, which contribute to their overall job satisfaction. Leadership and Management: Many employees appreciate the approachable leadership at Maybank, noting that management is supportive and values open communication. The company fosters a culture of feedback, which helps employees feel heard and valued.
Maybank offers a fun and healthy work environment where employees were able to work and strive to be better everyday. The employees were very supportive.

review_title: Great place to kickstart your career
review_body_text: A typical day is fast-paced, full of learning opportunities. Great management, supportive culture. Hardest part: tight deadlines. Best part: teamwork!
A lot people that you can meet. Salary is quite ok but not too fancy. Bonus can be down to 2 months. But usually is 3 months. Management will be depends on your manager
